box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #FF9933); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 622px; height: 1px; padding-top: 429px; margin-left: 1271px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
text-align: left;
text-align: left;
div.font: - Source code from original repo gets sent into my working folder

div.style: text-align: left;
text-align: left;
div.font: - From my working folder is i can send it to my own repo on github

div.style: text-align: left;
text-align: left;
div.font: - in my WD, I am making terraform infra, terraform bootstrap, CI/CD YAML files, and a docker file

div.style: text-align: left;
text-align: left;
div.font: - I apply bootstrap infra as the foundation to everything that comes after, this includes state bucket, lock table, OIDC trust, route53 zone

div.style: text-align: left;
text-align: left;
div.font: - Github actions has permission to interact with AWS when running yaml files, because of OIDC. It assumes an IAM role via it - not static keys are stored

div.style: text-align: left;
text-align: left;
div.font: - When pushing to github a Docker image is created from the WD and then pushed to Amazon ECR

div.style: text-align: left;
text-align: left;
div.font: - Then manually from guthub actions UI I am able to (with terraform IaC) set up all the AWS infra the app needs with the [ush of a button

div.style: text-align: left;
text-align: left;
div.font: - This involves the creaton of the network.

div.style: text-align: left;
text-align: left;
div.font: - The ECS Task def, service and cluster in the network. ECS Pulls the image for the task def from ECR

div.style: text-align: left;
text-align: left;
div.font: - The ALB pointing to the task

div.style: text-align: left;
text-align: left;
div.font: - And the domain cert from ACM which is a deeper process connected to cloudflare

div.style: text-align: left;
div.font: - DNS Hop chain: User > Cloudflare DNS > Route53 (Via NS Delegation) > ALB

div.style: text-align: left;
text-align: left;
div.font: - From there, the app is live. internet can type in domain, they are redirected to alb which directs them to task.

div.style: text-align: left;
text-align: left;
div.font: - Task connecting to outside network goes through IGW
